company.name: Botivate
company.stage: Growth Stage — 40+ team, scaling to enterprise

description: Botivate is a Business Automation and AI company. We don't sell ERP software. We help businesses run on autopilot — by understanding their processes deeply, standardizing workflows, automating operations, and layering AI on top. Our flagship product AutoRocket is an AI-first business operating system built from 70+ reusable automation modules developed from real client implementations across manufacturing, trading, hospitals, jewellery, real estate, steel, coal trading, solar, and service companies.
mission: Make every business run itself. Automate the business, not just the software.
vision: Become the world's leading Business Automation and AI Company. Every business decision backed by AI. AI Managers, AI Sales Teams, AI Operations, AI Finance, AI HR — a complete AI operating system where the business runs itself.
founding_story: Botivate started with just 2 people and a vision to solve real business problems. Instead of building software from an office, the founders worked directly at client locations — sitting with supervisors, managers, directors, accountants, plant heads, maintenance teams, stores, dispatch teams, and operators to understand root problems from the ground up. Every solved client problem was converted into a reusable automation module. This is how the company grew from 2 to 40+ professionals and 70+ modules.

core_product.name: AutoRocket
core_product.description: AutoRocket is an AI-first Business Operating System — positioned above traditional ERPs as the AI automation layer. It is not just ERP, not just CRM, not just AI — it is an operating system where AI manages the business. Built from 70+ proven automation modules.
core_product.positioning: Above ERPs. The AI automation layer for the entire business.
key_capabilities: AI Agents that manage business workflows autonomously
WhatsApp Automation for approvals, alerts and business communication
Director Dashboard with real-time business intelligence
70+ reusable automation modules across all business functions
AI Sales Agent for automated lead handling and follow-ups

evolution_phases.description: Company started with just 2 members and a vision to solve real business problems.
Worked directly at client locations instead of building software from an office.
Sat with supervisors, managers, directors, accountants, plant heads, maintenance teams, stores, dispatch and operators to understand root problems firsthand.
Started converting every solved client problem into reusable automation modules.
Expanded team from 2 people to 40+ professionals.
Built 70+ automation modules covering manufacturing, trading, HR, finance, CRM, production, purchase, inventory and AI.
Started integrating AI Agents, WhatsApp Automation and Business Intelligence into all products.
Began building AutoRocket as an AI-first business operating system — not an ERP replacement, but an AI automation layer above ERPs.
Positioning Botivate as a company that helps businesses run on autopilot. Focused on medium and large enterprises. Building toward every business running itself through AI.

vision_evolution: Phase 3: Become India's leading Business Automation Company.
Phase 4: Build AI that works for businesses.
Current Vision: Every business should run itself.
technology_evolution: Current: AI Agents, Workflow Automation, Cloud-native Platform, AutoRocket
customer_journey: Currently focused on medium and large enterprises
business_strategy: Train users (consulting, not just software delivery)
Convert every learning into a reusable product module
key_decisions: Instead of copying ERPs: Build from real business experience
Instead of selling software: Sell complete business automation
Instead of one industry: Serve every business vertical
Instead of one product: Build reusable modules
Instead of outsourcing understanding: Visit client sites personally
Instead of stopping after delivery: Provide continuous improvement
Instead of replacing employees: Make employees more productive with AI
Current major decision: Position AutoRocket above ERPs as the AI automation layer
lessons_learned: Software doesn't solve problems. Process does.
Users need consulting, not just software.
Automation should save time, not add work.
Every complaint is an opportunity to improve the product.
AI should assist people, not replace them.
Long-term trust matters more than short-term revenue.

failures_and_solutions.failure: Built features before fully understanding user workflows.
failures_and_solutions.solution: Now always understand the business and map workflows before building.
Started consulting and training users as part of every implementation.
Built workflow automation and WhatsApp alerts.
Adopted continuous product updates and change request process.
Convert every custom feature into a reusable module.

roadmap: Botivate → AutoRocket → AI Operating System → Business runs itself
Every business decision backed by AI
future_vision.ultimate_goal: Become the world's leading Business Automation and AI Company.

competitive_advantages: Built from real client site experience — not from copying competitors
70+ reusable modules developed from actual implementations
Deep domain expertise across manufacturing, trading, healthcare, jewellery and more
Consulting + software + training — full business transformation, not just software delivery
Continuous improvement model — every client feedback becomes a product improvement
AutoRocket positioned above ERPs as AI automation layer — unique positioning in market
40+ person team with real business domain expertise
Long-term trust relationships with enterprise clients

team.approach: Domain experts who understand businesses, not just developers
